text.title: Chaos Engineering Practice for Infra Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply chaos-engineering-practice-for-infra. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Hypothesise
step.description: Input: System map + SLO list. Action: Pick a dependency; state expected steady-state + predicted failure observable.. Output: Hypothesis card..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: System map + SLO list.

step.name: Bound blast radius
step.description: Input: Hypothesis. Action: List affected services/users; obtain sign-off if production-wide.. Output: Bounded experiment plan..

step.name: Wire abort criteria
step.description: Input: SLO list. Action: Encode automated abort triggers in chaos tool (FIS / Gremlin / Litmus).. Output: Safety net..

step.name: Run + observe
step.description: Input: Bounded plan + safety net. Action: Execute; collect telemetry; record actual observables.. Output: Experiment record..
step.note: Step 4. Required input: Bounded plan + safety net.

step.name: Convert learnings
step.description: Input: Experiment record. Action: File regression test / alert / runbook update PR.. Output: Closed-loop learning..
